_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: Analysis of RNAseq data using the CIBERSORT algorithm provided a breakdown of predicted immune cell composition changes...The only significant difference observed was a plasma cell gene signature in drug-sensitive tumors
details: Provided breakdown of predicted immune cell composition changes, showing significant plasma cell gene signature in drug-sensitive tumors
